title: Steamy Spicy Norwegian Shrimp Bowl
description: Peppery, springy, and comforting, this Norwegian-inspired dish is perfect for a sick day. Featuring saeujeot and shrimp paste, it's a flavorful and healthy option.
instructions: Combine saeujeot, shrimp paste, cooking sake, and 1 cup of water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 3-4 minutes per side. Drain and set aside.
In a separate pot, steam ginger and garlic for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add cooked shrimp, green onions, salt, and black pepper to the steamer basket. Steam for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
To serve, place cooked shrimp mixture onto a bed of steamed rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional green onions, if desired.
